prompt: A photorealistic architectural exterior render of a modern minimalist two-story house at golden hour. Clean concrete and warm wood facade, large floor-to-ceiling windows revealing a softly lit interior, flat roof with subtle overhang, integrated garage on the left. Surrounding landscape: low manicured grass, a single mature olive tree, a thin reflection pool along the front. Warm low sun raking from the right casting long soft shadows. Sky: gradient from peach to pale blue. Foreground: smooth concrete path. Architectural visualization aesthetic, sharp materials, photoreal rendering.
